subcodes.first_line: The Book from before the Wronged One unto one of the believers, that the call of this evanescent one may draw him unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی احد من المومنین لیجذبه ندآء هذا الفانی الی الله
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
